relationships: kab:Mary tenna-d dakken ur tezmir ad texdem acemma
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken Mary texdem aya
kab:Ur as-yeɛǧib ara i Tom wayen ayen texdem Mary
kab:Mary tḥulfa dakken ad texdem aɣan-is
kab:Ur as-yehwi ara i Tom wayen texdem Mary
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-tini ad texdem aya
kab:Ur cukkeɣ ara ilaq ad texdem aya i yiman-is
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-yini ad texdem aya
kab:Tella tesɛa akud akken ad texdem ayen tḥemmel
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tezmer ad texdem ayenni
